programme.title: Once Upon A Time In America
programme.desc: Sergio Leone's final film is the epic tale of the life of a Jewish gangster in New York.

programme.title: Copycat
programme.desc: Holly Hunter is an ambitious cop who tries to draw the forensic psychologist out of her self-imposed exile to help catch a murderer who is copying work of other serial killers.

programme.title: Rebel in the Rye
programme.desc: The life of celebrated but reclusive author, J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel, "The Catcher in the Rye".

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's a battle royale for country and cash as six of poker's best meet in Paris to fight for Europe's most prestigious title.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's a Caribbean island in a sea of cash as the World Poker Tour makes landfall in sunny Aruba for the $3,000,000 Aruba Poker Classic.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour tips its hat to a poker legend with a $4,000,000 shootout worthy of the great Doyle Brunson himself.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: The Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Under the inimitable direction of Robert Altman, Elliot Gould stars as the laid-back, legendary private eye Philip Marlowe investigating a mysterious murder. Also stars Sterling Hayden and Nina Van Pallandt.

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: Four buddies share a wild night of drinking in a ski resort hot tub and wake up with hangovers in 1986! Now, they’ll need the help of a one-armed bellhop and a hot tub repairman to survive the crazy 80’s, but it may change their future forever!

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Lyon Gaultier, a member of the French Foreign Legion who deserts his post in order to come to America and help the family of his murdered brother. But crossing the U.S. without a penny to his name proves difficult.

programme.title: Shadow Warriors: Assault on Devil's Island
programme.desc: Hulk Hogan leads an elite Navy SEAL team chosen for an audacious mission to rescue a group of Americans being held captive by a drug lord's soldiers, who want their leader released.

programme.title: True Confessions
programme.desc: Two of the finest actors of our time, Robert De Niro and Robert Duvall, star in this must-see tale of two brothers set on a collision course as the result of a brutal murder in 1940s Los Angeles.

programme.title: Righteous Kill: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: Two veteran New York City detectives (Academy-Award-winners Robert De Niro and Al Pacino) hunt a vigilante who may be one of their own.

programme.title: The Package
programme.desc: A career Army sergeant is assigned to take a prisoner from Berlin to Washington, D.C. When his prisoner escapes, he finds himself in the middle of a conspiracy whose masterminds want him out of the way.

programme.title: Transference
programme.desc: The wife of a CIA agent seeks the truth, after she discovers that her husband’s accident was part of an inside job.

programme.title: A.I. Rising
programme.desc: The relationship between a human and android spirals out of control with shocking consequences.

programme.title: Multiverse
programme.desc: Four brilliant students unleash a parallel reality during a quantum experiment, confronting deadly versions of themselves. As identities blur and tensions rise, only one version can survive—triggering a violent battle for existence and reality itself.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Gabon
programme.desc: The forests of Gabon are some of the densest and most mysterious in the world. But there are a few adventurous souls who risk it all in this green hell every day. They are the drivers of enormous logging trucks that can carry up to 40 tons of wood.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Brazil
programme.desc: Driving tankers loaded with 20.000 pounds of gasoline, these wild men drive on unmapped roads to deliver supplies to illegal gold mines in the heart of the Amazon Jungle.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Bolivia
programme.desc: Hundreds of metres above the ground, crisscrossing the valleys of Bolivia, is a network of makeshift cables.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Dambusters
programme.desc: Buffalo gets into the stunt flying business when veteran pilot Arnie flies the DC-4 for the re- enactment scene of a famous WWII bombing raid. A routine C-46 flight becomes dangerous when a hole in the plane's aging exhaust system sets off the fire alarm.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Chuck Walks
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits. Joe clashes with the maintenance department when a series of delays puts the sale of an old Canso waterbomber in jeopardy.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Gear Up, Gear Down
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over. Devan, Ian and Jimmy deal with a hydraulic fluid leak in the C-46 on the valley run.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage, Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul. Cory leads a rescue mission to retrieve an abandoned C-46 and Mikey escapes to Ottawa for a birthday joyride in a fighter jet.

programme.title: The Human Centipede 2 (Full Sequence)
programme.desc: Inspired by the fictional Dr. Heiter, disturbed loner Martin dreams of creating a 12-person centipede and sets out to realize his sick fantasy.

programme.title: Tales From The Crypt
programme.desc: A hooded crypt-keeper (Ralph Richardson) lets five sinners review their pasts before the final abyss.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: A bullied young boy befriends a young female vampire who lives in secrecy with her guardian. Starring: Kodi Smit-McPhee, Chloë Grace Moretz, Richard Jenkins

programme.title: 1978 FIFA World Cup

programme.title: FIFA World Cup™ Matches That Astonished the World
programme.desc: Relive two unforgettable encounters from the FIFA World Cup™.

programme.title: 1982 FIFA World Cup

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A veteran detective and a rookie cop have to stop a master thief's computer virus before it drains all the funds from a bank's accounts.

programme.title: The Bank Job
programme.desc: In 1971 London, a car dealer and his gang of thieves break into a bank vault and find far more than cash and jewelry.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham) goes after a serial killer who targets police officers.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Rocket Method
programme.desc: Ronnie O'Sullivan teaches snooker fundamentals, guiding viewers through the essential skills and techniques to improve their game, the Rocket Method.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Curse of The Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts looks at one of the most cursed periods in European history: the Middle Ages. Archaeologists reveal how wars, pandemics, and cataclysmic floods toppled the world of our ancestors. So how did Western society survive?

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 3
programme.desc: Set sail for Rathlin Island as we explore a Neolithic stone tool factory, a unique upside-down lighthouse and a World War II shipwreck.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 4
programme.desc: Venture to England's South Coast, as we dive with sharks, explore the battlements of Drake's Island, uncover the origins of Scouts, and discover fossils on the Isle of Wight.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt takes us to the Parthenon in the ancient city of Athens, where the removal of some priceless artefacts brought shipwreck, imprisonment, loss, and disfigurement.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins in the historical Kingdom of Benin, Africa. Destroyed in 1897, with its city burned to the ground and precious artefacts looted, did this bloody and violent end lead to a curse?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure begins in Cheshire, England where a discovery by peat-cutters revealed a story of violence, ritual sacrifice and even whispers of a curse.

programme.title: The Key
programme.desc: An elderly director of the Art Biennale is married to Teresa, and they are both looking for something new in their relationship. One day, he deliberately leaves the key to his diary of secret erotic fantasies lying on the floor.

programme.title: Nero and Poppea
programme.desc: Emperor Nero's dissolute life proceeds amid scandal, dissolution, and love affairs. Contributing to his unedifying parable are the complicated relationships with the women in his life...

programme.title: To Be Twenty
programme.desc: Lia and Tina are both young, beautiful and pissed off. The girls decide to hitchhike their way to Rome, where they find a handsome man who invites them to join his Commune. But things don't go as planned, and soon they become involved in prostitution.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Over the past two decades, Carol has hoarded her husband's home. With the mansion threatened to be condemned, the family unites to try to save the house and confront Carol about her behaviour.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Althea faces heavy fines for multiple vehicles, building materials and a 60-foot semi-trailer on her residential property; her 5,000 square foot unfinished dream home is filled with unsold inventory from a business that ended when her husband died.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Judy is an extreme germaphobe who spends her entire day engaged in sanitising rituals. However, she happens to live in a severe and extremely filthy hoard that's overrun with mice.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril offers Bert a deal to become the face of his new cologne line. Tempted by fame and money, Bert considers the offer, but soon realizes the cost of endorsing Cyril’s schemes and must choose between integrity and success.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril panics when his betrayed partner Karl Snarl returns for revenge. Meanwhile, Bert discovers an old helicopter, and Melissa must overcome her fear of heights to help save her friends during a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After losing power due to unpaid bills, Cyril plans to build a dam to control energy in the forest. Meanwhile, Bert and Cedric stay with Aunt Gertie, whose strict ways test their patience while bigger trouble brews outside.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cousin Bentley visits the Raccoons, bringing his usual quirks along. Meanwhile, Cyril seeks to regain his youth using a questionable potion, leading to chaos as his reckless attempt causes unexpected and humorous consequences.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Melissa explore echo caverns and discover strange cave art. Cyril, seeing profit potential, enters the art world and drives up prices. The gang must decide whether art is about value or meaning as greed takes over.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Believing Cyril is dying, Bert spends his savings on a tribute monument. When Cyril learns he is fine, he exploits the situation to sabotage the Evergreen Standard, forcing Bert to recover from his costly mistake quickly.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Cedric meet a hermit living in a swamp rumored to hold oil. Cyril attempts to buy the land, threatening the hermit’s home. The gang must protect the swamp and prove its worth beyond the profit Cyril seeks.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A misunderstanding leads everyone to believe Cyril is marrying Lady Baden-Baden. Cedric questions his past while Mr. Knox hides his feelings for her. As confusion grows, truths come out and relationships are tested.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs invent a time machine, which Cyril uses to alter past events for personal gain. However, his meddling causes chaos in the present, forcing the gang to fix the timeline before things spiral completely out of control.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril borrows a priceless diamond for a film, but it disappears. Bert investigates while Cyril tries to hide the loss from Lady Baden-Baden and Mr. Knox, leading to a frantic search filled with misdirection and secrets.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Adventurer Sir Malcolm invites Bert on an expedition, which Cyril secretly funds for treasure. As Bert seeks adventure and discovery, Cyril’s greed threatens the mission, putting everyone in danger along the way.

programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: Cold Blood: The Gainesville Ripper
programme.desc: August 26th, 1990. A deranged serial killer is on the loose in the college town of Gainesville, Florida. The first victims are two freshmen college roommates whose mutilated bodies are found posed in bizarre positions.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Cherry Hill Murder
programme.desc: On November 1st 1994, respected New Jersey rabbi, Fred Neulander, returns home to find his 52-year-old wife, Carol, dead on the living room floor. She has been savagely beaten and the cash from her successful bakery business is gone.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Lost Boy: The Adam Walsh Story
programme.desc: In one of the most notorious missing children cases, Adam Walsh, 6, steps into a stranger's car and disappears. A manhunt is launched but Adam's severed head is found two weeks later. More than a quarter of century passes before the mystery is solved.

programme.title: Cold Blood: More Than A Sister
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Lisa Monza is murdered in San Lorenzo, California, investigators look for a connection to other unsolved murders in the area. But it will take several years and help from an unlikely source before they can track down her killer.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Disturbed
programme.desc: On August 29th 1995, Mark Winger places a desperate call to 911. He tells authorities he’s just shot a man who was beating his wife with a hammer. Both his wife and her attacker are lying in a pool of blood on the dining room floor.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Somebody Knows
programme.desc: Kimberly Dunkin’s body is found with a single gunshot to the head, and though investigators suspect she was the victim of a gang war, it will take 15 years, a deck of playing cards, and a lucky break before the case finally begins to unravel.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trails of Evidence
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Betrayed
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: True Crime

programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado and they face a special challenge - getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Luv Still
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Day of the Dog
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Time to Cry
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow Dog turns to the fugitive's on-again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof
programme.desc: Today, Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Business
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. As Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack-O-Lantern
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: O Little Town of West Monroe
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Boomerang Becca
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie's Number Two
programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interviews her cousin, JD. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si spends the day over at Phil and Kay's, Jep stops by with the kids to keep them away from Jessica, who has taken ill.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Life of Si
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: From Duck 'til Dawn
programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Man to Man
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman would like to bridge the gap between himself and his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Jonathan Smith Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Jonathan tries to convince a powerful senator to restore severe budget cuts dealing with health-care. However, the assignment seems doomed when the senator suffers a fatal heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Oh Lucky Man
programme.desc: Mark plans to give a recent windfall to a boys' club. But first he must deal with some con artists.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Basinger's New York
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's assignment at Christmastime is to show a disillusioned columnist that there's still some good out there.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as priests in order to re-open an abandoned church as a shelter when a major fire breaks out in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Curses
programme.desc: Curses: Do cursed objects really exist? This episode explores a painting in Britain that is said to start deadly house fires, a sinister doll in Florida and a curse-proof house.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mysterious Vanishings
programme.desc: Mysterious Vanishings: Baffling stories of people who vanished without a trace, including a young Tasmanian pilot who is chased by unidentified aircraft before disappearing.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter: A look at the future of mind control, an extinct hobbit race and whether humans can regenerate limbs.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Life After Death
programme.desc: An emotional visit to a Civil War battlefield and a series of bizarre circumstances lead a Connecticut man to believe he is the reincarnation of a dead general. In Haiti, a man dies after a mysterious illness but returns from the grave 20 years later!

programme.title: Dynasty: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: Urgent business cuts short Blake and Krystle's honeymoon; Steven takes a job working for Matthew Blaisdel; Cecil proposes that Fallon marry his nephew.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Dinner Party
programme.desc: Blake invites Matthew to dinner at the mansion to entice him to return to Denver-Carrington; Krystle clashes with head butler, Joseph; Matthew tells Krystle he's still in love with her; Jeff attempts to win Fallon.

programme.title: Dynasty: Fallon's Wedding
programme.desc: Steven's ex-lover, Ted, arrives from New York; Fallon reluctantly marries Jeff Colby; Blake hires Michael, the chauffeur, to do undercover work for Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Chauffeur Tells a Secret
programme.desc: Steven is taunted on the job for being gay; Blake learns of the terms of Fallon's marriage to Jeff; Steven finds himself attracted to Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Bordello
programme.desc: Walter takes Steven to a bordello; Steven is blamed for sabotaging Matthew's rig; Krystle pawns her diamonds to help Matthew financially.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rod & Ebony
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Stephanie & David
programme.desc: Catfish brings together couples who've interacted solely through screens. In this edition, Stephanie searches for the man she's been talking to in an unseen episode.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rico & Ja'Mari
programme.desc: Rico wants to move to England to care for his ailing mother, but his intense online relationship with Ja'mari, an international male model, is giving him second thoughts about leaving. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Felicia
programme.desc: Mike and Felicia met online and soon hit it off. After agreeing to meet, Felicia stood Mike up, offering only thin excuses. Can Mike trust Felicia - or will he end up disappointed? (S1, ep12)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Cassie & Steve
programme.desc: Cassie was on a downward spiral until she got a friend request from a rapper named Steve. Two and a half years later, Cassie and Steve are engaged - but they have yet to meet. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Anthony & Marq
programme.desc: Anthony is a war veteran who wears his heart on his sleeve. Over a year ago, he bonded online with a caring man named Marq. Today, they're head over heels in love - but what is Marq hiding? (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom: Terrible Twos

programme.title: Teen Mom: Without You

programme.title: Teen Mom: Taking It Up A Notch

programme.title: Teen Mom: As Long As We're Together

programme.title: Teen Mom: Stay With Me

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Riders in the Storm

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Comeback Kid

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Richard Knight, an actor and laborer, became obsessed with Captain Kidd's treasure. He found clues in old maps and located a potential site in Communist Vietnam's Hon Tre Lon. Despite risks, he and Fred Graham journeyed there, only to be captured.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Book of Thoth, a legendary text of magic and wisdom, has inspired Freemasons, Tarot readers, and occultists across centuries. Yet, archaeologists doubt its existence despite its influence on esoteric culture from ancient Egypt to modern times.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1897, two brothers began a 50-year quest to find a treasure buried 70 years earlier in the Virginia Blue Mountains, documented in a secret code. They sought help from America's top code-breakers to unravel Thomas Beale’s treasure mystery.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Serial Killers
programme.desc: Serial Killers victims are often selected at random. The murders have only one thing in common: the bodies are savagely disfigured. Hunting them leads investigators into a world of darkness.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Gang Bosses
programme.desc: They rule the underworld: gang bosses. They make millions with racketeering and drug trafficking. For investigators, it is more than a fight against criminality – it is a veritable war.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Bakugan

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.desc: The World Poker Tour tips its hat to a poker legend with a $4,000,000 shootout worthy of the great Doyle Brunson himself.

programme.title: WPT Classics

programme.desc: Two time WPT finalist David Singer takes on a 24 year old Anders Henriksson, 22 year old Steve Paul-Ambrose and two 18 year old poker savants in the $5,600,000 Caribbean Poker Adventure.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Russia, France, Canada and the USA all send their best poker players to Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Species: Species (1995)

programme.desc: Blake Edwards directs this romantic high-adventure that has Inspector Clouseau's illegitimate (and alarmingly similar!) son (Roberto Benigni) botching a mission to rescue a kidnapped princess (Debrah Farentino).

programme.title: Shadow Warriors: Assault on Devil's Island
programme.desc: Hulk Hogan leads an elite Navy SEAL team chosen for an audacious mission to rescue a group of Americans being held captive by a drug lord's soldiers, who want their leader released.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb

programme.title: Warrior

programme.title: The Package
programme.desc: A career Army sergeant is assigned to take a prisoner from Berlin to Washington, D.C. When his prisoner escapes, he finds himself in the middle of a conspiracy whose masterminds want him out of the way.

programme.title: Street Kings

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: When Patricia is called to identify a body, she’s shocked to find her mirror image lying dead on a gurney. Determined to find out more about her surprise ‘twin’ and simultaneously, help her mother clear her father's name.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: The family are still estranged following Caroline's decision to move back to the decrepit Clearwater house with Du Plessis. Rosie is determined to reunite everyone, and plans a civilised dinner as a step towards reconciliation.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Welcome to the Revolution
programme.desc: The Raza receives a distress call from their handler, Tabor, but when they arrive he's nowhere to be found. Instead his former assistant Adrian is waiting for them on an outer colony in the middle of a stand off with their corporate overloads.

programme.title: Dark Matter: All the Time in the World
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to the rest of the crew Three has been trapped in a time loop, reliving the same day over and over. He must convince his crew mates that what's happening to him is real and find a way to stop the loop.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Give It Up, Princess

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fresh Paint

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fite Nite
programme.desc: While working on a high-stakes gun raid, Andy and Gail stumble upon a victim of domestic abuse whose brutal experience in the system has taught her not to trust the police.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy’s undercover skills are tested –and found to be lacking –during a citywidecampaign to clean up the streets, whenshe’s tapped to pose as a prostitute in order to arrest unsuspecting johns.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a young man meets a mystery woman, then vanishes. In New Jersey, a teenage girl disappears walking home from school. In each case, a psychic saw everything.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: A New Jersey woman is beaten to death with a hammer. In Louisiana, a frenzied struggle leaves a young mother dead, her son beaten. Investigators in both cases ask psychics for help. Psychics Nancy Orlen Weber and Rosemarie Kerr can see what others cannot.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: In Illinois, a teenage boy goes to interview for a job and vanishes. In New Jersey, two women are abducted and brutally murdered. Police turn to Carol Broman, Dorothy Allsion, and Nancy Orlen Weber, psychics who help them catch the killers.

programme.title: Paranormal Home Inspectors
programme.desc: When Alex’s mother passed away, he inherited the family home. Still struggling with his grief, Alex has found himself at the center of many supernatural experiences. Is it Alex’s own energy that’s causing them, or something more?

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A scientist discovers footage on his security camera that even he can't explain; and a sailing ship from the 1800's is home to a ghostly crew.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: Spirits from an abandoned slaughterhouse invade a couple's home. People at a health club work out under the watchful eyes of a cigarette-smoking ghost; and an Ohio woman is violated by a paranormal incubus in her own bedroom.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Shocking Secret Lovers
programme.desc: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next, Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a shocking person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Candid Confessions!
programme.desc: Mistie says that her man has been disloyal, but never guessed her best friend! Jose's two boyfriends don't know that they've been sharing him. Antjuan hates that his girlfriend strips for a living.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Let Me At Her!
programme.desc: It’s the battle of the exes! Tony fights to get her ex-lover back. Richard reveals to his wife that he’s had an affair, and watches as Lisa, his ex-lover, fights to get him back!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 13-Year-Old Father?

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson treat an injured man after a fierce encounter that he barely escapes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Baker Street Bachelors
programme.desc: A political leader is being blackmailed, and to find the blackmailers, Holmes and Watson join a marriage bureau. However, things don't go quite as planned, and Holmes winds up getting arrested and thrown in jail.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Diamond Tooth

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Inspector Lestrade looks to Holmes for answers, after two men are murdered on separate occasions.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining chefs cater for 40 `glampers' before a hectic dinner service which leads to a difficult decision for the chefs and Gordon himself. Someone will have to pay the ultimate price and be forced to leave the competition at this late stage.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The four remaining chefs are reunited with their loved ones for a taste test, with the winner dining out with their family at a posh restaurant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon's top two feel the pressure as they prepare their final menus. The pair do not have long to ponder and consider whether a simple or more adventurous approach will win the day.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear

programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Fighter
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Speed
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Pendulum
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Western
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Imitation
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carnies & Armories
programme.desc: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans and some vintage carnival gear. But will they get conned?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: It's Raining Ton
programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, a cat-and-mouse game ensues to get inside his mind and have him lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a missing woman is discovered by a deputy to be murdered in the backyard of her family home, investigators must learn whether the victim was killed by a mysterious driver seen lingering outside the house, or someone unexpected.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a young coal miner is murdered, shock waves are sent through a conservative mining town. Detectives try to determine the cause of the murder when multiple suspects arise.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: GMO - Genetically Modified Food
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims crop plants created for human or animal consumption using the latest molecular biology techniques are unsafe.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2001, British traveler Peter Falconio is presumed murdered in the Australian outback. Joanne Lees survives the attack, and Bradley John Murdoch is convicted of the murder in 2005. Peter's body is never found.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz visits the volcano that stopped air travel in 2010; predicting probabilities in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Avoiding jetlag; a demonstration of the size of the solar system; square-wheeled motorbike.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen's Lost Diary/Arthur's Knee

programme.title: Arthur: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When our heroes investigate a sudden pealing of bells, they discover that the Crystal Bells, which are said to ring only when the Legendary Pokémon Ho-Oh returns, are missing! The researcher Eusine seems to know something…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When Ash runs into his old rival Gary preparing to enter his Arcanine in a race, he decides to compete as well! But first, he’ll have to chase Team Rocket away from the Pokémon Day Care.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When the Pokémon Egg given to Ash goes missing, our heroes call on the help of a hapless Officer Jenny. It isn't long before they realize that if they want the Egg back, they'll have to find it themselves!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The moment has finally come: a Phanpy has hatched from Ash's Pokémon Egg! The little Pokémon is full of energy and soon charging off...with our heroes and Team Rocket in tow!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid

programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.

programme.title: Cybermutt
programme.desc: The powerful dog Rex is injured by a car while rescuing a young scientist from being run over. Feeling responsible for the condition of Rex the scientist uses his skill as a prosthetics inventor to give the dog a new, super-power body.

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Russia, France, Canada and the USA all send their best poker players to Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Only four players remain in the scramble to survive at Bellagio.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's one wild ride at the WPT Legends of Poker in Los Angeles as this final table fight takes off.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Only three remain at the WPT Legends of Poker in pursuit of a million dollar first place prize.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Reckless pro Mark Seif is back at his third WPT final table and more than willing to risk it all.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The Borgata Poker Open comes down to its exciting conclusion.

programme.title: Son Of The Pink Panther
programme.desc: Blake Edwards directs this romantic high-adventure that has Inspector Clouseau's illegitimate (and alarmingly similar!) son (Roberto Benigni) botching a mission to rescue a kidnapped princess (Debrah Farentino).

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: Indiscreet (1958)
programme.desc: Cary Grant is the suave American diplomat who pretends to be married in order to preserve his bachelor status. Ingrid Bergman is the glamorous leading lady of the London stage who has no scruples about having an affair with a married man.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: WARRIOR tells the moving and inspirational story of the Conlon family, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) and Paddy (Nick Nolte), who find redemption in the ring as they fight to repair themselves and their family.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Lost Treasure of Ugarit
programme.desc: Young archaeologist Jack Hunter refuses to join his mentor, Professor Shaffer, who believes a poem is a coded treasure map, on a relic hunt, until his friend is murdered to steal it. The suspect is a Syrian artifact trader so he flies to Damascas.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb
programme.desc: Jack Hunter is abducted blindfolded to a Turkish US base to be recruited by the NSA, told his mentor was killed because Albert Littmann's Russian mob employer Doridanov want the ancient Osiris-weapon.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: When Patricia is called to identify a body, she’s shocked to find her mirror image lying dead on a gurney. Determined to find out more about her surprise ‘twin’ and simultaneously, help her mother clear her father's name.

programme.title: Last Chance Café
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town.

programme.title: Lost Behind Bars
programme.desc: A woman author travels to a small Oregon town to research her latest book - the story of a crime committed by a young man who's now sitting on death row. As she digs for the facts, it soon becomes clear that the wrong person has been convicted.

programme.title: Martian Land
programme.desc: In the future, mankind lives on Mars. When a massive sandstorm breaks through, its inhabitants must stop the storm before it wipes them out next.

programme.title: Marjorie Prime
programme.desc: In 2050, 86-year-old Marjorie has a holographic companion who resembles her dead husband and is programmed to feed her the story of her life. With Lois Smith, Jon Hamm, Geena Davis.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: Encounter
programme.desc: A group of friends uncover an otherworldly object in a rural field, which they soon discover holds greater secrets than they could imagine.

programme.title: Timber Kings: High Rollers
programme.desc: Just hours from Manhattan, Beat creates a country retreat for a demanding French financier, while Joel’s Australian client makes a last minute request for a three-car garage.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: In foggy Newfoundland, Peter builds a duck-hunting cabin and gets initiated into island culture.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: In Northern BC, a challenging modern log home has Beat and his crew risking life and limb. Meantime, Joel and Bryan Sr. take a chance on hiring an eccentric perfectionist to carve a life-size statue on a tight deadline.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Active Duty
programme.desc: In California, Joel is under the gun, with a job that’s behind schedule before it even begins. Meanwhile, Beat marshals the troops to finish a mega project on the verge of shipping out.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Make a Mark
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. makes a mark in the self-proclaimed log home capital of the world. Back at the yard, Andre tries to control Peter when his pent-up creativity goes in overdrive.

programme.title: Timber Kings: The Getaway
programme.desc: As winter approaches, the rush to build two summer getaway homes is on. Peter leads his team in Alberta while Bryan Jr. and his guys head north to Alaska.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The New Invisible Man
programme.desc: Colonel March receives a queer complaint: a pair of disembodied gloves killed a manand there is no corpse, no blood, and no evidence of wrongdoing,

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: A psychologist is stabbed to death in a seemingly sealed room. Inspector March must find who killed him and how did they accomplish the task.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense
programme.desc: Colonel March's niece, a believer in spiritualism, hears her dead husband's voice and becomes convinced he has returned as a ghost; but has he?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: At Night All Cats Are Gray
programme.desc: A lady claims an odd man is following her and fears for her life. She’s later found murdered...in mismatched color, a telling clue for the inspector.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat
programme.desc: While on holiday in France, there is a murder at the docks and Colonel March is asked by a friend of the French police to assist.

programme.desc: Highlights from the match between Poland and Italy played at Camp Nou, Barcelona on July 8, 1982.

programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between Argentina and Belgium played at Estadio Azteca, Mexico City on Wednesday, 25 June 1986.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: A vacation in Spain turns nightmarish when a man's (Henry Cavill) family is kidnapped by agents who are hell-bent on recovering a mysterious briefcase.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: An expert (Sylvester Stallone) in prison security joins forces with an inmate (Arnold Schwarzenegger) to break out of a top-secret, high-tech facility.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Becoming Shiva (REDUX)

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Third Thing (REDUX)

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Signals Crossed

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A home invasion at an upscale address leads to a massive first response call that brings out the training officers in full force. After the scene is cleared, Andy and Traci remain behind with the terrified homeowner.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: Andy’s romance with Det. Luke Callaghan gets complicated when he chooses her for a special assignment -serving a search warrant for a bullet lodged in the head of a witness to murder.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Hot & Bothered
programme.desc: A severe heat wave wreaks havoc on the city, forcing the rookies to work around the clock to keep the peace. In the midst of the chaos, Andy discovers that a serial rapist may have resurfaced to prey on vulnerable teenage girls.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Honour Roll
programme.desc: After their High School Outreach assignment goes awry, Andy and Chris stumble on the victim of avicious beating behind a nightclub.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a couple's son dies, an experimental procedure harvests the boy's nerve cells, allowing the mother to give birth to a genetically identical child. But soon it becomes clear that this fetus is not just identical…it is actually Justin himself.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A man's family is turned upside down when he discovers that his son's college sweetheart is the same woman he rescued from a secret military experiment twenty years before...only she has not aged a day since. Peter Onorati and Fred Savage star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When the Stream -- an artificial system providing information to all society members through computer chips implanted in their brains -- begins to malfunction, an unlikely, primitive man (George Newbern) may be mankind's only hope.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a chemical war renders the world's population unable to conceive healthy children, a mother and father must escape from a sinister government agency intent on using their miraculously healthy newborn to repopulate the species.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a society imprisoned for generations by extraterrestrials who invaded Earth, an electronics expert (Harley Jane Kozak) discovers that not only are her human jailers really machines, but they also have been holding prisoners for nearly a century.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A preacher descends upon the 18th-century town of Heart's Desire and offers to share his extraordinary powers with four outlaws. But who is this stranger and why has he given these outlaws such deadly powers? Caspar Van Dien and Esai Morales star.

programme.title: Eye Witness
programme.desc: A lawyer goes to England to clear his friend of murder.

programme.title: Go to Blazes
programme.desc: A gang of aspiring bank robbers involve themselves with arsonists and purchase their very own fire truck in an attempt to create the ultimate diversion. But posing as firemen leads them to disaster.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Pilot

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee
programme.desc: Ton and Allen hit the road for Nashville, where they rumble with a band of tough, high-bidding bikers. The day explodes when the guys discover a 37 millimeter anti-tank gun and a cowboy's rodeo saddle.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless
programme.desc: A friendly competition with former employee Carolyn turns into a vicious battle for a 1968 Corvette Stingray, giving Carolyn the last laugh. Allen tests his Ninja skills with an antique sickle weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gone in 20 Seconds
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get taken down by their fiercest opponent, CJ, but a twist of fate keeps the guys in the game. They uncover a Geiger counter and NASCAR impact wrenches, while their accountant delivers some shocking news.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Don't Taze Me Bro
programme.desc: Two fierce opponents best Ton and Allen at the auction, leaving the duo in the lurch with a "trash unit" and little chance of breaking even for the day. And Ton gets tazed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: In 2001, British traveler Peter Falconio is presumed murdered in the Australian outback. Joanne Lees survives the attack, and Bradley John Murdoch is convicted of the murder in 2005. Peter's body is never found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1998, Peter Bergna's car crashes off a mountain, killing his wife Rinette. After suspicions arise and a first trial ends in a hung jury, Bergna is convicted of murder in 2002 following new testimony about his abusive behavior.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1995 Paris, Guy Georges, a serial killer, was linked to multiple murders through DNA and later confessed in court. He was sentenced to life in prison, leading to the establishment of a DNA database for offenders in France.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Birthday/Francine Frensky, Superstar

programme.desc: If you think the Tibbles are bad now, imagine what they'd be like if they had super powers! Then, D.W. needs money, quick. When she tries to pull a fast one on the Tooth Fairy, will Arthur have to pay?
